title: Rockstar confirms price and pre-order of GTA 6 with limited physical edition and controversy
summary: The game will cost 80 dollars, will be exclusive to single player at launch and will offer a definitive edition with additional content, while the absence of disk is debated.

title: Star Fox receives positive reviews on its return to Switch 2 with new content
summary: The remake of the N64 classic includes English voices, a launch patch, and a special event with Tetris 99.

title: Valve releases SteamOS and admits the Steam Machine is more expensive than desired
summary: The company allows anyone to create Steam consoles, while the community comments on its price and compatibility with AMD.

title: Kadokawa's CEO remains despite pressure from shareholders over Elden Ring
summary: The profitability of FromSoftware's star game causes an attempted dismissal that fails, but pressure continues.

title: Sony applies stricter measures against junk games on PlayStation Store
summary: The company removes low-quality titles and reinforces guidelines to clean up its digital store.

title: Chapter 5 of Deltarune is now available on Switch with its secrets
summary: Players can access new areas and hidden items like the Secret Egg and Red Ribbon.

title: Blizzard announces details of the next season of Diablo 4 with free trial
summary: The season will include a crossover with Overwatch and allow players to test the Sorcerer class for free.

title: Demon Slayer: The Hinokami Chronicles 2 announces its edition for Switch 2
summary: The fighting game will arrive in October with enhancements for Nintendo's new console.

title: Xbox tests a feature to avoid massive game updates
summary: The new Game Pass feature aims to solve the problem of large downloads that interrupt gameplay.

title: The Everyday Wonders expansion of Pokémon TCG Pocket launches on June 29
summary: The new card collection for the mobile game brings adorable illustrations and new mechanics.

title: Original Sonic games return in Sega Genesis cartridges for $100
summary: Sega launches limited physical editions of Sonic classics for collectors.

title: 007 First Light shows good progress in its version for Switch 2
summary: The James Bond metroidvania-style game is getting closer to its launch on Nintendo's console.

title: Dead or Alive 6 receives a new DLC fighter as its legacy is analyzed
summary: Minato joins the roster of downloadable characters and the community debates the current state of the series.

title: Overwatch players protest the high price of new skins
summary: The community considers the cost of cosmetics excessive and demands fairer prices.

title: Episodes and release date of X-Men '97 season 2 revealed
summary: Marvel unveils the full schedule for the second season of the animated series.

title: One Piece remake releases trailer and confirms its arrival on Netflix
summary: After three years of waiting, the new version of the anime presents a preview and release date.

title: A Tekken game will come to Switch 2, but not the expected one
summary: A title of the series is announced for Nintendo's new console, probably a spin-off or classic installment.

title: Baldur's Gate 1 and 2 receive a surprise update with improvements
summary: The classic RPGs from BioWare get a patch that adds new features and bug fixes.

title: Halo: Campaign Evolved, the board game based on the saga, will arrive in 2026
summary: The video game adaptation to board games will allow players to relive the original campaign with new mechanics.

title: Avatar Legends: The Fighting Game launches next month
summary: The fighting game based on the Avatar universe will be available in May with several characters.
